---
name: Add a channel
about: Suggest a new community for the registry
title: "Add: <community name>"
labels: ["new-node"]
---

## Channel

- **Name:**
- **Type:** (telegram-chat / subreddit / discord-server / directory / …)
- **URL:**
- **Audience size (rough):**
- **Primary language:** (e.g. `en`, `ru`)

## Post rules

What's allowed here? What gets posts removed? Format expectations?

## Why it belongs in the registry

One sentence. Have you personally posted here?

## Node JSON (optional — PRs preferred)

If you're comfortable opening a PR directly, copy the template from
[`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) and add a file at
`nodes/<type>/<slug>.json`. Otherwise this issue will get converted.
